text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
It's the day of the Japanese Derby. Rice Shower
and Mihono Bourbon exchange a firm handshake
in the runners' tunnel...

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
...And yet again, Matikanetannhauser watches
from afar. I ask her why she always hides, to which
she replies...

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
...And yet again, Matikanetannhauser watches
from afar. I ask her why she always hides, to which
she replies...

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
That's not a moment for an ordinary gal like me
to barge in on.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
She starts questioning why the director has such
high hopes for someone as ordinary as her. With
that on her mind...

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
The race to decide the number one Umamusume
of this generation, the Japanese Derby, begins!
